# Templates

Copy-paste starting points so every document of a given type looks the same. Consistency makes docs faster to write and easier to read.

## How to use a template

1. Open the template you need and copy its contents.
2. Create a new file in the matching folder (see [Getting Started](../getting-started.md)).
3. Fill in the placeholders in `<angle brackets>` and delete the guidance notes.
4. Propose the change as a pull request.

## Available templates

- [Epic template](epic-template.md)
- [User story template](user-story-template.md)
- [BRD template](brd-template.md)
- [Release note template](release-note-template.md)
- [Meeting notes template](meeting-notes-template.md)
